EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for Powered Now Hot Lead.
EmailTemplate.name: Powered Now Final Chance Email_SDR
EmailTemplate.subject: Final quote follow-up
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Lead.FirstName},
I’ve been trying to contact you to provide a business insurance quote but unfortunately, I’ve not heard from you.
We know you're busy, so we want to take one last opportunity to remind you of your exclusive 10% discount as a Powered Now customer.
Given we've not been able to contact you, we'll now be closing your file. However, if you want to move forward with a quote at any time - https://calendly.com/d/cnbd-zyn-qwh/kingsbridge-insurance-call-back-powered-now
Alternatively, let me know the best date and time for me to call you or give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
All the best!
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
